name: Kawela Bay
tagline: A secluded crescent bay past Turtle Bay Resort that feels like you stepped into a postcard from old Hawaii.
parking: Park at the public access lot near Turtle Bay Resort; 10-minute walk along the shoreline trail
bestTime: Mornings for calm water; summer for swimming, winter for dramatic scenery
talkStory: Most people turn around at Turtle Bay Resort and never discover Kawela Bay just past it. The walk along the coastal trail is beautiful, and when you arrive you'll likely have the beach nearly to yourself. The bay is protected by a reef so the water stays relatively calm. Ironwood trees provide shade right on the sand. This was a filming location for LOST and several movies — you'll see why.
